# Awesome MCP Servers

A curated list of MCP servers.

## Contents

- [Version Control](#version-control)
- [Databases](#databases)

---

## Server Implementations

### 🐙 Version Control

- [github-mcp](https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/github-mcp) - GitHub repository management, file operations, and API integration via MCP.
- [gitlab-mcp](https://github.com/acmecorp/gitlab-mcp) - GitLab repository and CI/CD pipeline access through the Model Context Protocol.

### 🗄️ Databases

- [postgres-mcp](https://github.com/example/postgres-mcp) - PostgreSQL query execution and schema introspection for AI assistants.
- [sqlite-mcp](https://github.com/example/sqlite-mcp) - Lightweight SQLite database access and management via the MCP protocol.

### ✅ Productivity

- [notion-mcp](https://www.notion.so/integrations/notion-mcp) - Notion workspace read and write access for AI-driven productivity workflows.

This line has no link and should be skipped gracefully by the parser.
